LanguageData.RimLocksmith.ApplyDefaultToNewColonyDoor: Use default preset for new colony doors
Newly initialized colony doors receive the current default preset.
LanguageData.RimLocksmith.ApplyDefaultToUnconfiguredC: Apply default to unconfigured colony doors
LanguageData.RimLocksmith.ApplyDefaultToAllColonyDoor: Apply default to all colony doors
LanguageData.RimLocksmith.AppliedDefaultCount: Applied RimLocksmith default to {0} colony doors.
LanguageData.RimLocksmith.SelectionSummary: Configuring {0} colony doors. Ignoring {1} non-colony or unsupported doors.
LanguageData.RimLocksmith.ResetSelectedToDefault: Reset selected colony doors to default
LanguageData.RimLocksmith.AllowOpenTooltip: Controls whether this group may actively open this closed colony door. Already-open doors use vanilla passage behavior.
